meta.title: HealUp - Medicine Request Platform
meta.description: HealUp connects patients with pharmacies to find rare medicines.

common.copyrightHealup: © {year} Healup ({brand}). All rights reserved for smart healthcare.

errors.loginFailed: Failed to log in. Check your details and try again.
errors.registerFailed: Failed to create account. Check your details and try again.
errors.sendOtpFailed: Could not send verification code. Please try again.
errors.noResetIdentifier: No recovery identifier found. Request a new code.
errors.geolocationUnsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
errors.geolocationDenied: Could not get your current location. Allow location access.
errors.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms of use and privacy policy.
errors.mapPickRequired: Please select your location on the map to continue.

landing.chooseAccountTitle: Welcome to Healup — choose your account type
landing.chooseAccountSubtitle: Your smart gateway to medication and healthcare management. Pick the path that fits you.
landing.patientLoginDesc: For anyone searching for medicine, managing personal orders, and tracking health records with ease and privacy.
landing.pharmacyLoginDesc: For pharmacy owners to manage inventory, receive incoming orders, and grow digital services.
landing.adminLoginDesc: Full dashboard for system supervisors to monitor performance, manage users, and ensure service quality.

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back to {brand}. Please enter your details.

signup.subtitle: Join the Healup health platform and start your journey toward better care

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Don't worry. Enter your email or phone number and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.footer: © 2023 Healup. All rights reserved for Healup Medical Platform.

verifyOtp.title: Verify code
verifyOtp.subtitle: We sent a 4-digit verification code to your email or phone. Please enter it below.
verifyOtp.timerHint: You can request a new code in {minutes}:{seconds}

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below to update your Healup account and keep your health data secure.
resetPassword.requirementComplex: Must include numbers and special characters

adminLogin.title: Admin sign in
adminLogin.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
adminLogin.disclaimer: This system is for authorized staff only. All activity is monitored and logged to protect data and privacy.
adminLogin.panelText: {brand} gives you everything you need to manage medical facilities and health data safely and efficiently.
adminLogin.footer: © {year} Healup Medical Solutions. All rights reserved.

hero.topBadge: The largest pharmacy network in the region
hero.subtitle: We connect patients with pharmacies that provide rare and essential medicines quickly.

search.placeholder: What medicine are you looking for?
search.emptyError: Please enter a medicine name before searching.

prescription.uploadSubtitle: Click here to upload your prescription file

how.title: How Healup works?
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to get your rare or missing medicine.
how.step1Text: Enter the medicine name in our search engine to check our wide database.
how.step2Text: If unavailable, send a direct request to pharmacies in our network with one click.
how.step3Text: Receive instant alerts when the medicine becomes available at nearby pharmacies.

why.f1Text: We include thousands of pharmacies across cities for better medicine availability.
why.f2Text: Our system sends your request instantly and you receive replies within minutes.
why.f3Text: Your medical data is encrypted and shared only with the selected pharmacy.

footer.tagline: We simplify the journey of finding medicine and healthcare providers with timely access to treatment.
footer.newsletterSub: Get the latest health updates and medicine availability alerts.

pharmacy.searchPlaceholder: Search for a patient or medicine...
